reasoning: SSL sweep at 28595.8 (May 18 low) followed by strong reversal candle closing 96% near high. Classic Tuesday Low PO3 pattern formed — manipulation phase completed, distribution to upside targeting BSL at 29348-29705. May 19 bullish candle (body 60%, minimal upper wick) shows buyer control. FOMC minutes released Wed, reduced uncertainty for Thu. ChoCh from May 18 noted but reversal candle suggests sweep not true reversal. Weighted score: 7.0/10 — moderate bullish bias.
